weekly picks (Jul 1 week 2026)

Posted on July 6, 2026 in 2026jul,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 July 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

07/08

  1. s41467-026-75346-5 Two-dimensional pixel-level addressable mid-infrared metasurface spatial light modulator (Nature Communications)

  2. s41567-026-03344-x Topological textures in polar materials (Nature Physics)

  3. s41567-026-03375-4 Visualization of the Zhang–Rice singlet, electronic molecules and Cooper pair formation in a cuprate superconductor (Nature Physics)

  4. s41586-026-10882-0 Publisher Correction: A 98-qubit trapped-ion quantum computer with all-to-all connectivity (Nature)

  5. s41598-026-57525-y Modeling the resilient modulus of railway subgrade material considering the effects of initial stress state under long-term cyclic loading (Scientific Reports)

  6. xdcg-6df5 Nonparametric Learning Non-Gaussian Quantum States of Continuous Variable Systems (PRL)

  7. b16v-hwp2 Spontaneous Quantum Turbulence in a Newborn Bose-Einstein Condensate via the Kibble-Zurek Mechanism (PRL)

  8. v8x8-ft81 Emergence of Universality in Transport of Noisy Free Fermions (PRL)

  9. xkh7-gdqm Entanglement Growth from Entangled States: A Unified Perspective on Entanglement Generation and Transport (PRL)

  10. d3fz-5755 Skeleton of Isometric Tensor Network States for Abelian String-Net Models (PRL)

  11. qprk-k7wn High-Temperature Fermionic Gibbs States are Mixtures of Gaussian States (PRL)
